creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Carlo Strub from comment #1)

> ....native=/usr/ports/devel/pijul/work/target/release/build/ring-f284026f989044e5/out -L native=/usr/ports/devel/pijul/work/target/release/build/rust-crypto-4ca8a45f20fae8b5/out` (signal: 9, SIGKILL: kill)

looks like it got killed due to `SIGKILL`. I'm not sure why that happened for you though. Maybe some resource limit exceeded for you ?

Following is corresponding excerpt from a build log on my host (from December 04, 2017):
